title: stephanophysum repens
intro: Stephanophysum repens, also known as creeping Stephanotis, is a type of flowering climber that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stephanophysum repens include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote digestion, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, colds, and digestive issues.
